description: Minimal caption-only posts with seasonal or religious greetings, lacking visual storytelling or engagement hooks. Typically one-liner phrases with emoji.
structural_recipe: Post a simple greeting or seasonal message (2-5 words maximum) with minimal accompanying visuals. Use common Islamic/cultural phrases like 'كل عام وأنتم بخير' with single emoji. Avoid calls-to-action, product details, or narrative. Let brevity and cultural sentiment carry the message.
why_it_works: Aligns with authentic, understated communication valued in conservative Saudi markets. Brief respectful greetings feel genuine rather than commercial, creating trust through cultural resonance rather than persuasion tactics.
transplantation_caveats: Minimal engagement data suggests low conversion potential despite cultural alignment
Risk of appearing inactive or low-effort to younger, trend-focused audiences
Works only during specific seasonal/religious moments; ineffective year-round
May underperform in competitive F&B sectors requiring active community engagement
cultural_constraints: Limited to appropriate Islamic calendar moments (Eid, Ramadan, New Year)
Brevity respected culturally but must maintain dignity and proper Arabic phrasing
